remarks: Had approximately 2cm length wise rock at base of corer.

Field team misidentified a dark mineral horizon for organic soil and stopped when they thought they reached the bottom of the perceived O layer. There may have been a some organic mixed in but the sample is mostly mineral
Seems to be some mineral soil mixed with the organic
